name: filter
description: A group of toggleable pill or outline buttons for filtering content by category

meta.name: Filter
meta.description: A group of toggleable pill or outline buttons for filtering content by category

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible label for the filter group.

props.name: options
props.description: Array of { label, value } objects to render as filter buttons

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Initial selected values for uncontrolled use

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called with the selected values whenever the selection changes.

props.name: multi
props.description: Allow multiple items to be selected simultaneously

examples.title: Single-select
examples.code:
<Filter
  options={[
    { label: 'All', value: 'all' },
    { label: 'Active', value: 'active' },
    { label: 'Archived', value: 'archived' },
  ]}
  aria-label="Filter by status"
/>

examples.title: Multi-select
examples.code:
<Filter
  multi
  options={[
    { label: 'Design', value: 'design' },
    { label: 'Engineering', value: 'engineering' },
    { label: 'Marketing', value: 'marketing' },
  ]}
  aria-label="Filter by team"
/>

examples.title: Outline variant
examples.code:
<Filter
  variant="outline"
  options={[{ label: 'React', value: 'react' }, { label: 'Vue', value: 'vue' }]}
  aria-label="Filter by framework"
/>

whenToUse: Tag or category filtering on listing pages where the active filters must remain visible
Facet chips that toggle content visibility (e.g. product categories, team labels)
whenNotToUse: Navigation between distinct views — use Tabs
A binary on/off switch — use Toggle
Form field for selecting a value — use Select or Checkbox

antiPatterns.why: Filter is for narrowing visible content, not routing between views

related.name: Tabs
related.reason: Tabs navigate between views; Filter narrows displayed content

related.name: Toggle
related.reason: Toggle is the binary on/off primitive; Filter handles multi-option sets

related.name: Tag
related.reason: Tag displays the currently active filters as dismissible chips

intent.a11yRationale: Wraps buttons in a role="group" so screen readers announce the group label; each button uses aria-pressed to communicate selected state without relying on color alone

flexibility.note: pill suits floating filter bars; outline suits embedded filter rows within a bordered container
single-select for mutually exclusive categories; multi for additive facets
